title: caustis pilisepala
intro: Caustis pilisepala, also known as the hairy sheath fern, is a type of flowering plant native to Australia. It is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Caustis pilisepala include reducing fever, alleviating pain, and promoting wound healing. Caustis pilisepala can be prepared as a herbal tea or infusion by steeping the leaves in hot water, making it a versatile and accessible treatment option.
